goal: search for movies via the TMDb API to find films and watch their trailer in the web application
benefit: so that I can preview trailers directly in the UI without leaving the application
acceptance_criteria: A search query returns a list of movies with titles, posters, and brief details.
The displayed details also include the trailer, which is displayed directly in the UI.
An additional API (YouTube) is used to fetch trailer data.

goal: hover over movies to display their details
benefit: so that I can quickly view more information about a movie without extra clicks
acceptance_criteria: Movie details are displayed upon hovering over movie posters.

goal: be suggested movies using the upgraded movie suggestion algorithm
benefit: so that I receive refined recommendations based on multiple dimensions
acceptance_criteria: Movie suggestions are made via several dimensions (genre, actors, popularity, directors, and my already watched list such that similar movies to the ones I rated negatively are not suggested).

goal: view a list of 5 suggested movies below my watchlist using the first version of the movie suggestion algorithm
benefit: so that I can easily add recommended movies to my watchlist
acceptance_criteria: One can only edit their own want-to-watch list.
Movie suggestions are made via the dimensions: genre and popularity of movies.
Suggested movies can be added to the watchlist.
Suggested movies can be added to the watched list.
No movies already on the watchlist are suggested.
No movies marked as watched are suggested.

goal: search for movies via the TMDb API to find films to add to the group pool
benefit: so that I can view movie details and have a quick way to watch trailers if needed
acceptance_criteria: A search query returns a list of movies with titles, posters, and brief details.
The displayed details include a 'Watch Trailer' button which, upon clicking, redirects the user to YouTube in a new tab to view the trailer.
Invalid queries return a 'no results found' message.
The search function responds within a reasonable time.
One can search for movie titles, directors, and actors.

goal: invite friends and manage group membership including termination
benefit: so that I can efficiently manage my group for movie selection
acceptance_criteria: Invited users receive a request in the application, and acceptance makes them members of the group.
Invited users can leave groups.
The group creator can delete a group.
Only usernames of registered users can be invited.
The group creator has the option to invite all users from their Friends list or select specific ones (multiple-choice).
Invitations to groups from friends are automatically accepted.

goal: view my profile to see my personal details and all stored data
benefit: so that I can review my information, watchlist, and friend list
acceptance_criteria: The profile page displays the user’s information, including the want-to-watch list, favorite genre, favorite film, watched movie list (movies marked as watched), and Friend list.
Data loads correctly and errors are handled with sensible messages.
This page is accessible only to logged-in users.
